name: Inbox Triage
description: Classify the inbox, surface urgency, and suggest the next responses or actions.

steps.memoryQuery: email follow-up urgent waiting reply customer stakeholder

steps.prompt:
Inspect inbox-related context and prepare an inbox triage summary. Use connected email tools if they are available. If there are no email tools connected, state that clearly and provide a manual triage checklist instead.

Recent memory:
{{step.recent_memory.output}}

Return sections: Urgent now, Needs reply today, Waiting on others, Can defer, Suggested next messages.
